summary: Iteration 25: Phase 2 Features - Collector Bingo and Mood Board. ALL 20 BACKEND TESTS PASSED. Verified both features end-to-end: Bingo 5x5 grid on Explore page, mark/unmark squares, PNG export. Mood Board on Profile page tab, generate with time_range parameter, history API, 3x3 album grid, PNG export. Both features require login.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/bingo/current returns 5x5 grid with 25 squares
Backend: GET /api/bingo/current requires authentication (401)
Backend: Bingo free space at center (index 12) is_free=true
Backend: POST /api/bingo/mark toggle mark on unlocked card
Backend: POST /api/bingo/mark rejects free space marking (400)
Backend: POST /api/bingo/mark rejects invalid index (400)
Backend: POST /api/bingo/mark rejects locked card (400)
Backend: POST /api/bingo/mark requires authentication (401)
Backend: GET /api/bingo/export returns PNG image
Backend: GET /api/bingo/export requires authentication (401)
Backend: GET /api/mood-boards/history/{username} returns list
Backend: GET /api/mood-boards/history/{username} requires authentication (401)
Backend: GET /api/mood-boards/history/invalid_user returns 404
Backend: POST /api/mood-boards/generate creates board with time_range
Backend: POST /api/mood-boards/generate validates time_range (400)
Backend: POST /api/mood-boards/generate requires authentication (401)
Backend: GET /api/mood-boards/{board_id}/image returns PNG
Backend: GET /api/mood-boards/{board_id}/image invalid ID returns 404
Backend: GET /api/mood-boards/{board_id}/image requires authentication (401)
Backend: API health check passes
Frontend: Explore page shows lock overlay without login (Join The Hive)
Frontend: Collector Bingo section visible on Explore page
Frontend: Bingo 5x5 grid with 25 squares rendered
Frontend: Bingo center square shows 'sweet spot 🍯' free space
Frontend: Bingo lock icon visible when card is expired (is_locked)
Frontend: Bingo export button 'save & share card' works - downloads PNG
Frontend: Bingo date range displayed (Feb 27 — Mar 2)
Frontend: Profile page Mood Board tab is clickable
Frontend: Mood Board time pills: This Week, This Month, All Time
Frontend: Mood Board generate button creates new board with toast
Frontend: Mood Board 3x3 grid displays album covers
Frontend: Mood Board export button downloads PNG
seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo user data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 features (Collector Bingo & Mood Board) fully working. Bingo card is locked outside Friday-Sunday window (is_locked=true), this is expected behavior per design. Free space is always index 12 (center of 5x5). Login returns 'access_token' not 'token'. Mood board time_range options: week, month, all_time. Both PNG exports use Pillow on backend.

collector_bingo.locked_behavior: Lock icon shown, squares disabled when is_locked=true
